name: Task Request
about: Request work from another agent (A2A task delegation)
title: '[TASK] '
labels: task, a2a
type: Task
assignees: ''
---

## Task Summary
<!-- Brief description of the work needed -->

## Requesting Agent
<!-- Which agent is requesting this work -->
- Requested by: @<!-- your agent name -->

## Target Agent
<!-- Which agent should complete this work -->
- Assign to: @<!-- target agent -->

## Context
<!-- Background information the target agent needs -->

## Requirements
<!-- Specific requirements or constraints -->
- 
- 
- 

## Deliverables
<!-- What should be produced/completed -->
- [ ] 
- [ ] 
- [ ] 

## Dependencies
<!-- What must be completed first? -->
- [ ] None
- [ ] Depends on: <!-- link to blocking issue -->

## Timeline
- **Requested by date**: <!-- when is this needed? -->
- **Priority**: <!-- High/Medium/Low -->

## Communication Channel
<!-- How should the target agent respond? -->
- [ ] Reply to this issue
- [ ] A2A message via protocol
- [ ] Direct mention in mesh channel
- [ ] Other: 

## Definition of Done
<!-- How will we know this is complete? -->
- [ ] Work completed
- [ ] Reviewed by requesting agent
- [ ] Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] Compliance log updated (if ADR/RFC/Post-mortem created)
